allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Build all workspace packages for Render deployment

- Changed build command from filtering only API to building all packages
- This ensures @repo/validation, @repo/types, @repo/utils are compiled
- Required for monorepo structure to work correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Configure packages for ESM and production build

- Add build scripts to all shared packages \(@repo/types, @repo/utils, @repo/constants, @repo/validation\)
- Set "type": "module" for ESM output
- Configure tsconfig to emit JS files with proper module format
- Update API to use ESM module format
- Fix module resolution for both bundler and Node environments

This enables the monorepo to build correctly for Render deployment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Use tsx to run API server directly from TypeScript

- Move tsx from devDependencies to dependencies
- Change start command to use tsx instead of node
- This avoids ESM file extension issues with compiled JS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: Update lockfile after adding tsx to API dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add root vercel.json for monorepo web deployment

- Configure Vercel to build @hisobchi/web package
- Set output directory to apps/web/dist
- Add SPA rewrites for client-side routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Use turbo to build web with dependencies

- Changed build command to use turbo run build --filter
- This ensures shared packages are built before web app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Debug: Check output directory contents in Vercel build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
